summary: Iteration 44: Complete testing of Liveries page feature. All backend tests passed (9/9). Frontend fully functional - Liveries nav link, page loads with 98 ship series/815 paints, paint selector pills change images/descriptions, search/Fleet Only/acquisition filters all work, RSI Store links have valid URLs and external link icons.
passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/liveries returns data with success=true - PASS
BACKEND: GET /api/liveries returns loading=false (cached data) - PASS
BACKEND: GET /api/liveries returns total_series=98 > 0 and data array - PASS
BACKEND: Each series object has 'series', 'paint_count', and 'paints' array - PASS
BACKEND: Each paint has 'name', 'description', 'acquisition' fields (image_url optional) - PASS
BACKEND: RSI Store paints have 'store_url' field with valid URL (39 paints found) - PASS
BACKEND: In-Game paints have 'price_auec' field with numeric value (306 paints found) - PASS
BACKEND: Data volume: 98 series, 815+ paints - PASS
BACKEND: Multiple acquisition types present (In-Game, RSI Store, Event Reward, Limited Edition, Subscriber, Special) - PASS
FRONTEND: Liveries nav link appears in top navigation bar between Vehicles and Components - PASS
FRONTEND: Click Liveries nav → page loads with 'LIVERIES' heading and '98 ship series · 815 paints' count - PASS
FRONTEND: 98 ship series cards display with images and paint selector pills - PASS
FRONTEND: Click a different paint pill on a card → image changes and paint name/description updates (tested 100 series) - PASS
FRONTEND: Search input filters cards by ship name (searching 'Aurora' returns 1 card) - PASS
FRONTEND: Fleet Only toggle works (shows 0 cards when enabled for test user with no fleet) - PASS
FRONTEND: Acquisition filter buttons filter cards (RSI Store filter shows 19 series) - PASS
FRONTEND: RSI Store paints show clickable 'RSI Store' link with external link icon (Apollo Delphi paint has valid RSI URL) - PASS
FRONTEND: In-Game paints display aUEC prices (19,742 aUEC for 100 series) - PASS
FRONTEND: Dashboard page loads correctly (not affected) - PASS
FRONTEND: Ships page loads correctly (not affected) - PASS
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - livery data is scraped from starcitizen.tools wiki
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 44 verified Liveries page feature: (1) Backend /api/liveries returns 98 ship series with 815 paints scraped from starcitizen.tools wiki. Data includes name, description, acquisition type, price_auec for In-Game, store_url for RSI Store, and image_url. (2) Frontend Liveries page has search, Fleet Only toggle, and acquisition type filters. Cards show paint selector pills that change images when clicked. RSI Store paints have clickable links with ExternalLink icon. All pages (Dashboard, Ships) remain unaffected.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. Feature working as specified. Note: livery data takes ~60-90 seconds to load on first backend start (background scraping), then cached in memory. Frontend polls every 5s while loading.
